record.field: res.partner: toggle Membership/Org tabs by company_type

xpath.expr: //page[ .//field[contains(@name,'rotary')] or .//field[contains(@name,'club')] or .//field[contains(@name,'district')] or .//field[contains(@name,'ri_')] or .//field[@name='club_type'] or .//field[@name='club_type_id'] or .//field[@name='club_id'] or .//field[@name='district_id'] or .//field[@name='rotary_id'] or .//field[@name='rotary_member_id'] or .//field[@name='rotary_club_id'] or .//field[@name='club_number'] or .//field[@name='club_name'] or .//field[@name='club_code'] ]
